generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex in guarantees
Align helper declaration type with the expression in comparisons and assignments
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE scalar declaration types are int, real, and bool
Use const name : type = value; and eq name : type = expression; for declarations
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references absent from the analyzed model
